controller.prompt: If every puncture site is configured, jump to step 15. If not, jump to step 10.

cb_step_1.title: Select CT Volume
cb_step_1.instruction: In the 'Spine CT' section, choose the CT volume for processing.

cb_step_2.title: Click Next on Load Image Volume page

cb_step_3.title: Adjust ROI Boundaries
cb_step_3.instruction: Manually adjust the boundaries of the ROI.

cb_step_4.title: Set Instrument Parameters
cb_step_4.instruction: Select the 1st instrumented level, number of sides, number to instrument, and approach direction.

cb_step_5.title: Click Next on Define ROI page

cb_step_7.title: Add Fiducial Points
cb_step_7.instruction: Click in the 2D views to add fiducial points. Add three times the '# to Instrument' value.

cb_step_8.title: Set Level/Side/Landmarks
cb_step_8.instruction: Select the level, side, and landmarks using the widget.

cb_step_9.title: Click Next on Place Landmarks page

cb_step_10.title: Choose Puncture Site and Screw Diameter
cb_step_10.instruction: Choose the puncture site and select screw diameter.

cb_step_11.title: Adjust Puncture Site Line
cb_step_11.instruction: Adjust the start and end points of the puncture site line in the 2D views.

cb_step_14.title: All Puncture Sites Configured?
cb_step_14.instruction: Select Yes if all puncture sites are configured, No to continue configuring.

cb_step_15.title: Click Next on Adjust Screws page

cb_step_17.title: Review Grade Screws Results
cb_step_17.instruction: Review the generated Grade Screws output table.

cb_step_18.title: Click Next on Grading Step page

operation_descriptions: Advance to the next step after loading the image volume
Manually adjust the boundaries of the ROI.
Advance to the next step after defining surgical ROI
Activate landmark placement mode by clicking 'Place a control point'
Advance to the next step after placing landmarks
Manually adjust the start and end position of puncture site in 2D views.
Update the screw plan after adjusting the puncture site
Confirm the screw adjustment by clicking OK
Advance to the next step after adjusting screws
Advance to the next step after grading

ground_api_evidence_note: ground_api_evidence is pre-revision retrieval evidence; final_api_evidence reflects the current validated templates.
